calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs; Memorandum Of P/A; And Declaration Of Gregory J. Bulliung In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF ALAN WONG'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs; Memorandum Of Points and Authorities And Declaration Of Gregory J. Bulliung In Support Thereof IS GRANTED AS TO DUPLICATE AND INTERPRETER COSTS. COSTS ALLOWED IN THE AMOUNT OF $864. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/CK)

MOTION To Vacate The Dismissal Filed By Plntf Alan Wong
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
ELAN ALEXANDER, ESQ., (510)835-3400, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, WAI WONG
GREGORY J. BULLIUNG, ESQ., (415)841-9000 AND (415)989-8209 FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, ALAN WONG

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT WAI WONG'S MOTION To Vacate The Dismissal Filed By Plaintiff Alan Wong is denied. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
